item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: MicroMania Midget Wrestling: Fostoria, OH at Venue 18 - 06/18/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/05/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 11295 OH-18, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA MicroMania Midget Wrestling returns to Venue 18 on Thursday June 18th, 2026 in Fostoria,OH
item.dc:creator: MicroMania Midget Wrestling Tour
item.yodel:media_alt_text: MicroMania Midget Wrestling: Fostoria, OH at Venue 18 on Jun 18, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include Music & Entertainment and fostoria.

item.title: Summer create and play kids class event - 06/20/2026 12:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for a fun-filled summer craft event where creativity, kindness, and community come together! Kids ages 9 and up will paint their very own mini sandbox turtle, then fill it with sand and colorful mini beach toys to create a one-of-a-kind summer keepsake. This hands-on activity is more than just crafting — it’s a reminder that we all play better in the sandbox together. Through creativity and positive connection, kids will be encouraged to practice kindness, inclusion, respect, and teamwork while having fun in a relaxed and welcoming environment. This is a free to participate event with limited seating. Please follow this link to reserve your seats! https://www.zeffy.com/en-US/ticketing/create-and-play-kids-event-class Saturday, June 20th, 2026 12:00 PM – 1:00 PM Ages 9 & Up Come create, be kind, and have fun with us this summer!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer create and play kids class event on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include teamwork and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: 2026 VetFest - 06/20/2026 3:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 167 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Another year of bringing Veterans and Community together through music and fun! This years event will feature multiple bands and food as normal. We are working diligently to make this event better than the last. This feed and outline will be updated as we move forward.
item.dc:creator: Dress, Right, Dress
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 VetFest on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Causes and bands.

item.title: 2026 Birthday (Gun) Raffle - 06/20/2026 7:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 120 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA RAFFLE Its official! We will be holding our first large item raffle. Both were locally manufactured or built: Grand Prize: AR15 (Anderson lower with a Magpul stock and grip; 16 inch Ballistic Advantage 1/7 5.56 barrel; Anderson enhanced lower parts kit) Built and painted by local Daniel Cole (Army) Consolation Prize: Customs Fire Pit (approximately 28x28in) fabricated by https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/pricemanufacturingllc?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZP6Kp_RnyP-jvkrn3r-eHcYqd7u4WSGi3o_yiSerLBsbV3-7Z7ctDB-BszZQILrDEzd3O-Dq40qC_kj7p3PytOWZaSQwj3ssMb7IMXbyacQFqq_ZomKsXPeE3SLwcGLUQ5FefTDNO8MGNAhC3lOBsT&__tn__=q will be sold at $10/ea Holder swears/affirms they are legally allowed to own/possess forearm IAW State of Ohio and Federal Laws (for firearm, anyone can by a ticket to win pit). Winner must complete necessary paperwork. Winner will have to submit a background check to Johnson's Hunting & Fishing on State Rte 53 in McCutchenville. All fees paid by raffle proceeds. will be picked up at same location upon completion and legal requirements. tickets are on sale both physical and online. Drawing will be held June 20th, 2026. $10/ea Legal Disclaimer: Dress Right Dress Inc. does NOT sell or manufacture these items. The agency is the mere beneficiary of said raffle proceeds. Any damage, physical or mental harm is at the responsibility of the winners of each prize, thus waiving all legal responsibility from the organization, officers, Board of Directors, their heirs, or personal properties. Also waiving responsibility from those partners and manufacturers. Ticket holders must live in Ohio. Winners must be able to pick up items. Winner must submit and successfully complete a background check through: Johnson's Hunting & Fishing 8501 County Hwy 16 Mccutchenville, Ohio 44844 Contact Dress Right Dress for other ticket options.
item.dc:creator: Dress, Right, Dress
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Birthday (Gun) Raffle on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include background check and customs fire pit.

item.title: Out of Eden-A Tribute To The Eagles Summer Concert - 06/20/2026 7:00pm EDT to 06/20/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 167 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get ready for a great night of classic rock in Downtown Tiffin! Join us for Out of Eden – A Tribute to the Eagles on Saturday, June 20 at 7:00 PM at the East Green Amphitheatre. Sing along to all your favorite Eagles hits in a fun outdoor concert atmosphere with friends, family, and the community. This is a free community concert sponsored by Simply Shop Local, celebrating summer and supporting our local businesses. Bring a chair or blanket, enjoy the evening, and experience the music that defined a generation right here in Tiffin. Rain Location: If the weather doesn’t cooperate, the concert will move to The Ritz Theatre in Downtown Tiffin. Mark your calendar, invite your friends, and come celebrate the sounds of the Eagles with us!
item.dc:creator: Simply Shop Local
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Out of Eden-A Tribute To The Eagles Summer Concert on Jun 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include local businesses and outdoor atmosphere.

item.title: Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026 - 06/21/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/28/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 79 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Save the dates for Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026! Get ready to celebrate the flavors of the season with Taste of Summer Seneca County, returning June 21 to 28, 2026! This weeklong culinary event invites locals and visitors to explore limited-time, summer-inspired specials from restaurants, cafés, bakeries, bars, food trucks, and more across the county. From refreshing drinks to seasonal dishes and sweet treats, Taste of Summer highlights the delicious diversity of Seneca County’s food scene while encouraging guests to visit new places and support local businesses. The more locations your support, the more prizes you'll win! Details on prized and locations coming soon, stay tuned!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026 on Jun 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include food scene and local businesses.

item.title: Father’s Day BBQ - 06/21/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/21/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 15127 E Township Rd 12, Attica, OH 44807, USA Stop by for our annual Attica Lions Father’s Day barbecue at the Attica Fairgrounds. Meals will be your choice of grilled pork chops or chicken with side dishes of potato salad, applesauce, a dinner roll, and Pepperidge Farm cookies. Suggested donation is $15 per meal and you can pick them up in a drive-through fashion between 11 AM and 1 PM on Sunday, June 21.
item.dc:creator: Attica Lions Club
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Father’s Day BBQ on Jun 21, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include drive-through meals and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Gemstone Discovery Day - 06/21/2026 11:00am EDT to 06/21/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 15248 E Township Rd 178, Bellevue, OH 44811, USA Bring your young explorers to Seneca Caverns and have fun with them on top of the cave as they learn and play! Gemstone Discovery Day Package price is $5 per child and includes: • Pay Dirt gemstone bag- panning for real gems at our outdoor sluice is a fun, hands-on activity for kids to learn & start a gemstone collection! • Make & Take Crafts- at our special, above-ground “craft cave”- includes creating your own pet rock, coloring pages and much more! • Old Fashioned Stick- enjoy an old-fashioned candy stick • Fun for ages 4-12. • Located at Seneca Caverns, just 4 miles south of Bellevue, Ohio. • Bring your own lunch and enjoy our shaded picnic area. • 1-hour guided cave tours available; tickets sold separately- visit our tour page for details. Purchase tickets the day of the event or on-line at our website https://senecacavernsohio.com/gemstone-discovery-day
item.dc:creator: Seneca Caverns
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Gemstone Discovery Day on Jun 21, 2026 in Bellevue, OH. Featured themes include make & take crafts and young explorers.

item.dc:creator: Big Mike's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of Summer Seneca County 2026 on Jun 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include taste of summer and taste of summer seneca county 2026.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/21/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/21/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 107 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive experience and seasonal.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/21/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/21/2026 4:00pm EDT

item.dc:creator: Venue 18
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Twisted Insane on Jun 21, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include concert and live.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 06/22/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/22/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on Jun 22, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Health & Fitness and Science & Tech.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 06/22/2026 12:00am EDT to 06/22/2026 1:00am EDT

item.dc:creator: Mercy Health - Defiance Hospital
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on Jun 22, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include quality care and Health & Fitness.

The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health - Springfield
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on Jun 22, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include quality care and Health & Fitness.

item.title: Good Morning Hike - 06/22/2026 8:00am EDT to 06/22/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Fort Seneca, OH 44883, USA Join Linda Rose as we explore the trails to appreciate what nature has to offer on this good morning.   This walk will last about 1 ¼ hour and qualifies for the Walking Stick Program.  Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Good Morning Hike on Jun 22, 2026 in Fort Seneca, OH. Featured themes include walking stick program and Outdoors.

item.title: Kids Baking Series - 06/22/2026 9:00am EDT to 06/22/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Give your young baker a chance to build real kitchen skills and confidence in a fun, hands-on environment! This three-part baking series led by Kylee Percival from The Cookies and Cream Chronicles is designed for students entering grades 4–6 and will teach them how to create delicious treats from scratch while also learning clever ways to elevate everyday boxed desserts into something truly special. Along the way, they’ll explore basic techniques, kitchen safety, and creative decorating, all while enjoying the sweet rewards of their hard work. It’s the perfect mix of learning, creativity, and fun!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Kids Baking Series on Jun 22, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include grades 4 6 and kids baking series.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 06/22/2026 1:00pm EDT to 06/22/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 186 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Washington Street Outfitters
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jun 22, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer fun and tiffin wild goose chase.

item.title: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study - 06/22/2026 6:00pm EDT to 06/22/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for Celebrate Recovery Bible Study Monday nights at 6pm. A group for everyone, as we deal with the hurts, hang ups, and habits in life. Bring your family, friends, and neighbors. A time of Bible Study, sharing life, and fellowship. No childcare is provided.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study on Jun 22, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include family friends neighbors and fostoria, ohio.

item.title: Summer Hydraulics - 06/23/2026 8:00am UTC to 06/23/2026 4:30pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Length: 24 Hours $2000 per person Course Description: This course is a basic study of the principles of fluid power systems based on industrial applications with hydraulics. A heavy focus is on hydraulic systems, components, assembling circuits and demonstrating the circuits operate correctly. The student will learn how to interpret a hydraulic circuit print and predict the operation of a circuit based on the print. The student will also assemble and troubleshoot the circuits in a controlled lab environment with industrial grade devices. Students will also utilize the simulation software, Automation Studio, to simulate hydraulic circuits in an asynchronous format. The student will also be focusing on safety when working w
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Hydraulics on Jun 23, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include hydraulic circuits and industrial.

item.title: Summer Microsoft Excel 1 - 06/23/2026 8:00am UTC to 06/23/2026 4:30pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Length 8.5 hours $179 per student Excel is Microsoft’s powerful and easy-to-use spreadsheet program, which provides you with an extensive set of tools to organize, analyze, present, and store data. This course is intended to help all novices and computer users get up to speed with Excel quickly. We will cover different features, including creating a new spreadsheet, working with basic formulas and functions, making a spreadsheet look professional and presentable, and saving and printing a spreadsheet.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Microsoft Excel 1 on Jun 23, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include computer and computer users.

item.title: Family Storytime - 06/23/2026 10:30am EDT to 06/23/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will offer “Family Storytime” on Tuesdays, June 2, 9, 16, 23, and 30 at 10:30 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. “Family Storytime” features stories, songs, rhymes, games, and more for the entire family. All ages are welcome and registration is not required. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Storytime on Jun 23, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and stories songs rhymes games.

item.title: Summer Storytime - 06/23/2026 10:30am EDT to 06/23/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Storytime on Jun 23, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and storytime.

item.title: The Seventy Second Ohio Volunteer Infantry - 06/23/2026 10:30am EDT to 06/23/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Mike Gilbert always puts on an awesome and informative take. Please call Allen Eiry at (419) 448-9774 to sign up.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The Seventy Second Ohio Volunteer Infantry on Jun 23, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include sign up and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Grab And Go Lunches For Kids - 06/23/2026 12:00pm EDT to 06/23/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Grab And Go Lunches For Kids are each Tuesday in June and July 12pm-1pm, or until they run out, at FNC Hope Community Center.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Grab And Go Lunches For Kids on Jun 23, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include community center and fostoria church of the nazarene.

item.title: Seneca County Safety Council | June Meeting - 06/23/2026 12:00pm EDT to 06/23/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 928 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the Seneca County Safety Council June meeting on June 23, 2026 at 12:00 PM at the North Central Ohio Educational Service Center. This "Best Practices Roundtable: Sharing Success Stories" will give members the chance to highlight what’s working in their safety programs and learn from one another. If you are bringing a guest, please register them no later than June 16 at http://www.SenecaRegionalChamber.com/guest.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca County Safety Council | June Meeting on Jun 23, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seneca regional chamber and success stories.
